controls.text: Submit global search unavailable: enter a search term.
controls.aria: Submit global search unavailable: enter a search term.
Notifications
Help
Coverage trend · last 12 weeks: Historical posture snapshots are shown only when available.
Posture by domain: Domain scores use backed command-center domain signals when available.
Open discovery for People domain posture
Open discovery for Sales domain posture
Open discovery for Finance domain posture
Open discovery for Customer domain posture
Open discovery for Marketing domain posture
Risk breakdown: Risk distribution renders unavailable unless explicit exposure severity signals are present.
Open stewardship for open exposures
Open audit evidence for medium-risk findings
Open audit evidence for informational risk findings
Top catalogs · health snapshot: Catalog rows are derived from visible asset inventory and backed metadata coverage fields.
Critical data elements: CDE rows require backed CDE registry data or asset-level critical-element metadata.
Activity stream: Recent activity uses audit/governance events returned by the command-center API.
